explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.path_to_improvement: Document AI governance structure, including oversight of vendor AI tools.

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: A press release describes the use of AI tools for pricing optimization and customer matching. It details the expansion and operationalization of these AI tools, outlining their application in pricing, engagement, and efficiency.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release, "Watsco Digital AI Tools," provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. It supports this by describing the AI tools' use for pricing optimization and customer matching, detailing their expansion and operationalization, and outlining their application in pricing, engagement, and efficiency.
relevant_sources.title: Watsco Digital AI Tools

summary.overall_findings: Watsco's public disclosures address transparency, describing the use of AI tools for pricing optimization and customer matching in press releases. This pillar represents the only one of 7 evaluated areas with documented evidence. Drawing from 7 publicly available sources, no qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
